docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LICEA, MIGUEL HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHR, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LICEA, MIGUEL $2,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,632.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 5/9/06 10:00AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAY-09-2006 TO JUN-20-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
